gt_sql: SELECT T1.name FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T2.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix'
pred_sql:
SELECT c.name
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix'
question: Which circuit did the 2009 Spanish Grand Prix use?
